title: Automated Mapping of Quantitative Mineralogy from X-ray Spectroscopy Scans
author: Reed, Miles
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This is a supplement package for the journal article "A free, open-source method for automated mapping of quantitative mineralogy from energy-dispersive spectroscopy scans of rock thin sections" submitted to Geoscientific Instrumentation, Methods, and Data Systems . This supplement package includes three example datasets with each containing six smooted elemenal intensity rasters (Ca, Na, Mg, K, Fe, and Ti) derived from energy-dispersive spectroscopy of rock thin sections, training polygons, and sample boundary polygons. The package also includes a step-by-step guide for our method detailed in the paper. Also, the package contains Python code, a README, and an environment.yml to run a similar random forest image classification using the package scikit-learn for comparison.
